task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset is loaded and selected for analysis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The data panel on the left side of the screen should display 'Sample Order Lines' as the active dataset.

task_completion.description: Verify that a Combo Chart (Dual Axis) visualization type is selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The visualization grammar panel or the chart canvas itself should indicate that a 'Combo' or 'Dual Axis' chart type is being used.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Order Date' (Year) is placed on the X-axis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the grammar panel (Category/X-axis section) or on the chart's bottom axis label, 'Order Date' or 'Year' should be visible.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Revenue' is configured to display as bars on the primary Y-axis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The grammar panel should show 'Revenue' assigned to the Bar (Y-axis) section, and the chart canvas should display vertical bars representing revenue.

task_completion.description: Verify that a calculated metric for 'YoY Revenue Growth %' is created, formatted as a percentage, and displayed as a line on the secondary Y-axis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The grammar panel should show 'YoY Revenue Growth %' (or similar) assigned to the Line (Y2-axis) section. The chart canvas should display a line graph overlapping the bars, and the secondary axis or tooltips should show percentage formatting (%).

task_completion.description: Verify that the workbook is saved with the name 'Annual_Growth_Analysis'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The top title bar of the application, the save dialog, or the file explorer should display 'Annual_Growth_Analysis' as the workbook name.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Oracle Analytics graphical user interface to build the chart.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Oracle Analytics Desktop UI with drag-and-drop actions or menu selections, not a terminal window or code editor generating a .dva file.

integrity.description: Verify the chart is genuinely rendered by the analytics software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The visualization canvas should show an interactive, software-rendered chart with standard Oracle Analytics UI elements (like tooltips, grammar panels, and data panels), not a pasted image or mockup.

integrity.description: Verify the YoY Growth is an actual calculated metric in the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of the calculation editor being used or the metric appearing in the 'My Calculations' folder in the data panel, rather than hardcoded text labels.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file is 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\Annual_Growth_Analysis.dva'. A valid Oracle Analytics .dva file is a ZIP archive exceeding 10KB in size. The project metadata inherently references the required terms 'Revenue', 'Growth', and 'Year'.
